CREATE TABLE exported_sites (id INT PRIMARY KEY, source_url VARCHAR(255), destination_url VARCHAR(255), export_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO exported_sites (id, source_url, destination_url, export_time) VALUES (1, 'www.foo.com', 'http://www.mydrive.com:8990/DAV/sites/', NOW());
INSERT INTO exported_sites (id, source_url, destination_url, export_time) VALUES (2, 'www.foo.com', 'http://www.mydrive.com:8990/DAV/sites/', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY');
INSERT INTO exported_sites (id, source_url, destination_url, export_time) SELECT id, source_url, destination_url, NOW() FROM exported_sites WHERE export_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS';
SELECT * FROM exported_sites WHERE source_url = 'www.foo.com' AND destination_url LIKE 'http://www.mydrive.com:%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exported_sites WHERE export_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 MONTH';
UPDATE exported_sites SET destination_url = 'http://www.mydrive.com:8990/DAV/new_sites/' WHERE source_url = 'www.foo.com' AND destination_url = 'http://www.mydrive.com:8990/DAV/sites/';
DELETE FROM exported_sites WHERE export_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS';
SELECT DISTINCT source_url FROM exported_sites WHERE destination_url LIKE 'http://www.mydrive.com:%';
SELECT source_url, COUNT(*) AS export_count FROM exported_sites GROUP BY source_url HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
